content: Cycle 01 passed cleanly; no loop needed.

This is the first trail ever written to .pmcro/trails/ in schema-compliant form -- the .pmcro directory did not exist before this cycle, confirming the earlier session's own description of the prior 'dry-run' as never having produced a real, checkable trail. No prior_cycles exist to compare against for recurrence, so no EC can be crystallized from this trail's own history alone.

Cross-trail pattern, not this-trail-only: counting the prior session's fix (README.md, AGENTS.md, Law 2 doc -- 3 stale 'sibling pmcro-skills repo' references) plus this cycle's finding (cto/SKILL.md, evolve-colony.md -- 2 more), the same finding type has now surfaced 5 times across two separate review passes, each of which believed it had found 'the' stale references. Threshold (3+) is met. Raising EC-010, staged for approval rather than appended live -- see reasoning in make seq 4 re: treating standing-constraint publication as needing human sign-off, same as the diffs themselves.
Checker passed (cycle 01). No re-plan needed. Recommend orchestrator seal needs-approval per evolve-colony.md step 4 (unconditional for self-evolution cycles).
